brand.name: Cascade Stone Supply
brand.aiSummary: Cascade Stone Supply is a natural stone brokerage based in Portland, Oregon, connecting Pacific Northwest quarries with contractors, architects, and landscape designers across the Western US. Specializing in basalt veneer, flagstone, and river rock, they offer direct quarry relationships, competitive pricing, and a free sample program with 48-hour shipping.

b2bSupplyChain.roleDescription: Sources natural stone products from Pacific Northwest quarries and connects them with contractors, architects, and landscape designers. Acts as an intermediary — does not hold inventory but coordinates sourcing, logistics, and delivery directly from quarry to job site.

materialsHandled.name: Basalt Veneer
materialsHandled.aiSummary: Premium basalt veneer sourced from Central Oregon quarries. Available in natural split-face and honed finishes. Popular for modern commercial and residential exteriors throughout the Pacific Northwest.

materialsHandled.name: Flagstone
materialsHandled.aiSummary: Natural flagstone in basalt, sandstone, and quartzite varieties. Sourced from regional quarries for patios, walkways, and outdoor living spaces. Available in irregular and pattern-cut options.

materialsHandled.name: River Rock & Landscape Stone
materialsHandled.aiSummary: Decorative river rock and landscape stone in multiple sizes and colors. Bulk delivery available for commercial landscaping projects. Sourced from Columbia River and Willamette Valley deposits.

logistics.leadTime: 1–2 weeks for stocked items, 4–6 weeks for custom orders

sampleProgram.description: Free sample boxes shipped within 48 hours. Up to 5 stone types per request. Sample kits include finish swatches and spec sheets.

b2bSupplyChain.complianceNotes: All stone products meet ASTM C615 and ASTM C616 standards for building stone.
